creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
This error occurs during port updating recently while security/heimdal is also installed:

06:59:10 runner cc -pipe -march=native -fno-omit-frame-pointer -DLIBICONV_PLUG -fno-color-diagnostics -g -fstack-protector -DLDAP_DEPRECATED -fno-strict-aliasing -fPIC -pthread -DSTATIC_HEIMDAL_VERS_HOSTCC_MODULES=NULL -DSTATIC_HEIMDAL_VERS_HOSTCC_MODULES_PROTO= -MD -DLIBICONV_PLUG -I/usr/local/include -Idefault/source4/heimdal_build -I../source4/heimdal_build -Idefault/include/public -I../include/public -Idefault/source4 -I../source4 -Idefault/lib -I../lib -Idefault/source4/lib -I../source4/lib -Idefault/source4/include -I../source4/include -Idefault/include -I../include -Idefault/lib/replace -I../lib/replace -Idefault -I.. -Idefault/source4/heimdal/lib/roken -I../source4/heimdal/lib/roken -I/usr/local/include -D_SAMBA_BUILD_=4 -DHAVE_CONFIG_H=1 -D_GNU_SOURCE=1 -D_XOPEN_SOURCE_EXTENDED=1 ../source4/heimdal/lib/vers/print_version.c -c -o default/source4/heimdal/lib/vers/print_version_130.o
../source4/heimdal/lib/vers/print_version.c:46:32: error: use of undeclared identifier 'heimdal_version'
    const char *package_list = heimdal_version;
